name: Red Eye Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim and discard visible fat from the chicken.
2. In a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat, heat 1 tablespoon oil.
3. Add the chicken to the skillet. Sprinkle with 1/4 teaspoon white pepper, 1/4 teaspoon black pepper, 1/4 teaspoon paprika, and 1/8 teaspoon Cayenne pepper. Season with salt to taste.
4. Brown the chicken for 2 to 3 minutes on one side.
5. Turn the chicken over and sprinkle with the remaining seasonings. Continue pan frying until the chicken is cooked through. Remove from the skillet and keep warm.
6. Add the remaining oil and flour to the skillet. Cook, stirring frequently, until the flour is well combined and lightly browned, about 3 to 4 minutes.
7. Gradually add the chicken broth and tomato sauce, continuing to cook and stir until the sauce thickens and becomes smooth. Season with salt and additional Cayenne pepper to taste.
8. Spoon the sauce over the chicken and serve.
Preparation time: 10 minutes
Serves: 4
